violations.text: Various foods were observed held at 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was adjusted to 3 degrees cooler (36). New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The walk-in unit was observed with an elevated ambient temperature. Unit was set at 39 but ambient was 44 degrees. Food was observed elevated as well. Temperature was set for 36 degrees. PIC to contact refrigeration technician to service unit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
